zh.lifeSummary: 當Rebecca Chapman於1617年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾赫爾時，她的父親Robert John Chapman21歲，母親Mrs Robert John Chapman18歲。她於大約1643年與Lieutenant William Bushnell Sr of Horsham在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦賽布盧可結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1703年5月14日在美國康乃狄克州米德萊可笛卡爾 賽布盧可享年86歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦賽布盧可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rebecca Chapman于1617年出生在英国英格兰越可爾赫爾时，她的父亲Robert John Chapman21岁，母亲Mrs Robert John Chapman18岁。她于大约1643年与Lieutenant William Bushnell Sr of Horsham在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦賽布盧可结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1703年5月14日在美国康涅狄格州米德萊可笛卡爾 賽布盧可享年86岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦賽布盧可。

nameMeanings.name: Chapman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a merchant or trader, Middle English chap(pe)man, chepman, Old English cēapmann, cēpemann, a compound of cēap ‘barter, bargain, price, property’ + mann ‘man’.
Jewish: adopted probably for a like-sounding or like-meaning name in some other European language; see for example   Kaufman  .

History: This name was brought independently to North America from England by numerous different bearers from the 17th century onward. John Chapmen (sic) was one of the free planters who assented to the ‘Fundamental Agreement’ of the New Haven Colony on June 4, 1639.

variants.name: Kaufman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Meyer, Chaim, Emanuel, Moshe, Eytan, Herschel, Zvi, Ari, Aron.
Americanized form of German   Kaufmann  , and a variant of the same Jewish surname.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the personal name Kaufman meaning ‘merchant’. Compare Koyfman 2.

variants.name: Chipman
meanings: English: from Middle English chipman (Old English cȳp(e)mann), a side form of chapman, chepman ‘merchant, trader’; see Chapman , with which this name was interchangeable.

variants.name: Copeman
meanings: English (Norfolk and Suffolk): patronymic from the early Middle English personal name Cop(e)man, an Anglicized form of Old Scandinavian Kaupmaðr. It is a transferred use of Old Scandinavian kaupmaðr (Old Danish køpman) ‘merchant’, cognate with Old English cēapmann (see Chapman ), but there is no evidence for the occupational term in Middle English.
Americanized form of North German   Koopmann   or Dutch   Koopman  .

nameMeanings.name: Rebecca
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, from the Latin form of the Hebrew name Rebekah, borne by the wife of Isaac, who was the mother of Esau and Jacob (Genesis 24–27). The Hebrew root occurs in the Bible only in the vocabulary word marbek ‘cattle stall’, and its connection with the name is doubtful. In any case, Rebecca was Aramean, and the name probably has a source in Aramaic. It has always been common as a Jewish name; in England and elsewhere it began to be used also by Christians from the 14th century onwards and especially at the time of the Reformation, when Old Testament names became popular. It was very common among the Puritans in the 17th century, and has enjoyed a tremendous vogue in England since the latter part of the 20th century, among people of many different creeds. In Scotland this is found as an Anglicized form of Beathag .

en.lifeSummary: When Rebecca Chapman was born in 1617, in Hull, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert John Chapman, was 21 and her mother, Mrs Robert John Chapman, was 18. She married Lieutenant William Bushnell Sr of Horsham about 1643, in Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 14 May 1703, in Old Saybrook, Middlesex, Connecticut, United States, at the age of 86, and was buried in Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rebecca Chapman est née en 1617, à Hull, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert John Chapman, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Mrs Robert John Chapman, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Lieutenant William Bushnell Sr of Horsham environ 1643, à Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 mai 1703, à Old Saybrook, Middlesex, Connecticut, États-Unis, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterrée à Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rebecca Chapman 1617 in Hull, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert John Chapman 21 und ihre Mutter Mrs Robert John Chapman 18. Sie hat um 1643 in Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America Lieutenant William Bushnell Sr of Horsham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 14. Mai 1703 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Old Saybrook, Middlesex, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rebecca Chapman è nata il nel 1617 nel Hull, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert John Chapman, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Mrs Robert John Chapman, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Lieutenant William Bushnell Sr of Horsham circa 1643, nel Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 14 maggio 1703, nel Old Saybrook, Middlesex, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 86 anni, e fu sepolta a Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Rebecca Chapmanが1617年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアハルで生まれた時，父Robert John Chapmanは21歳，母Mrs Robert John Chapmanは18歳であった。約1643年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ロンドンサイブルークでLieutenant William Bushnell Sr of Horshamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1703年5月14日にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ミッドレセックスオルド サイブルークで86歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ロンドンサイブルークにて埋葬された。

ko.Saybrook, Connecticut, British Colonial: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 지브룩

ko.lifeSummary: Rebecca Chapman(이)가 1617년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 훌에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert John Chapman(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Robert John Chapman(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 대략 1643년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 지브룩에서 Lieutenant William Bushnell Sr of Horsham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1703년 5월 14일 미국 코네티컷 주 미들레세스 드 지브룩에서 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 지브룩에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rebecca Chapman nasceu em 1617, em Hull, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert John Chapman, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Robert John Chapman, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Lieutenant William Bushnell Sr of Horsham aproximadamente 1643, em Saybrook, New London, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 14 de maio de 1703, em Old Saybrook, Middlesex, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América, com 86 anos, e foi sepultada em Saybrook, New London, Conecticute, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rebecca Chapman родилась в 1617 г. в местности хулл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert John Chapman было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs Robert John Chapman, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lieutenant William Bushnell Sr of Horsham около 1643 г. в местности сеибрук, ню лондон, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 14 мая 1703 г. в местности олд сеибрук, миддлесекс, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 86 лет и была похоронена в местности сеибрук, ню лондон, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rebecca Chapman nació en 1617, en Hull, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert John Chapman, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Mrs Robert John Chapman, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Lieutenant William Bushnell Sr of Horsham aproximadamente 1643, en Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 14 de mayo de 1703, en Old Saybrook, Middlesex, Connecticut, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 86 años, y fue sepultada en Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.
